overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a sci-fi action game showing a power-armored space marine with a jetpack flying through a debris field of destroyed spacecraft in a blue nebula environment. The character navigates through floating wreckage and approaches large derelict structures.

scattered wreckage and fragments of destroyed spacecraft floating in space
blue and teal nebula clouds filling the background
bright purple and white light source illuminating the left side of the scene

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a space marine in power armor flying through a vast debris field. The blue nebula background surrounds the scene with a bright purple light source visible to the left. The character maintains steady forward flight through scattered wreckage with thrusters glowing blue.

events.description: character banks sharply left and activates main thrusters for evasive maneuvering through debris

agents.ego_description: banking left and right to navigate through denser clusters of debris and wreckage, with thrusters firing orange

entered.detail: larger pieces of ship wreckage and structural fragments

segments.scene_description: The space marine begins active maneuvering, banking left and right through denser debris clusters. The jetpack thrusters fire bright orange as the character navigates the obstacle field, moving away from the initial light source toward larger wreckage pieces.

scene_state.functional_zone: derelict space station wreckage with large platforms

events.description: approaching massive derelict space station structure with metal platforms and scaffolding

agents.ego_description: flying close to large derelict structures and platforms, navigating around the wreckage of a destroyed station

large industrial platform with railings and scaffolding

segments.scene_description: The character approaches and flies close to massive derelict space station wreckage. Large metal platforms and structural beams fill the view as the space marine navigates around the destroyed architecture, passing within close proximity to the platform structures.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement as a space marine flies from a vast, open debris field toward the imposing ruins of a derelict space station. It begins with the character gliding through scattered wreckage against a blue nebula, illuminated by a bright purple light source to the left. As the flight progresses, the camera tracks the marine banking left and right through denser clusters of debris, with the jetpack thrusters shifting to a bright orange glow while moving away from the initial light. The scene then expands to reveal massive derelict structures, with the camera following the character as they weave closely around giant metal platforms and structural beams. Finally, the movement culminates in a tight navigation through the destroyed architecture of the station's wreckage.
